title: GEEPAS Multi Chopper | 200W Mini Electric Food Processor | Stainless Steel Blades One-Touch Operation 350ml Bowl | Mixer Dicer Food Chopper for Mixing Mincing Pureeing Salads Salsa Pesto Curry Pastes
features: ✅ POWERFUL 200W MOTOR-Chop, blend, mince, or puree in seconds with a strong 200W motor. Perfect for daily kitchen tasks—whether it’s veggies for lunch or prepping sauces, this vegetable chopper gets the job done fast and smooth.

✅ COMPACT & EASY TO STORE-Short on space? No worries! This 350ml salad chopper fits neatly into any kitchen drawer or shelf. Great for small kitchens, quick meals, or when you just want less mess on the countertop.

✅ SIMPLE ONE-TOUCH USE – 1) Assemble the food chopper and add ingredients evenly around the blades 2) Secure the lid and plug into the socket 3) Enjoy simple one-touch use by pressing down to chop 4) Remove the motor and lid to serve or store. Fast and fuss-free prep every time!

✅ MULTIPURPOSE STAINLESS STEEL BLADES – Sharp and durable stainless steel blades slice, dice, and mince everything from onions and garlic to herbs and vegetables. This veg chopper is built for all kinds of prep work—fast and effortless.
✅ ALL-IN-ONE FOOD PREP TOOL-From salsa and dips to baby food and more—this electric chopper can handle it all. It’s your everyday helper for faster cooking and tastier meals, without switching tools.
✅ QUICK CLEANING AFTER USE-Hate cleanup? We’ve got you. Just rinse the parts with warm soapy water and wipe the motor and chopper with a damp cloth. No mess, no stress—ready for your next recipe.

✅ SAFE TO USE DESIGN-The lid must be locked to start—no lock, no power. This safety feature ensures the electric vegetable chopper won’t run until everything’s in place, giving you peace of mind every time.

✅ STYLISH & DURABLE DESIGN-Made with strong materials and a sleek black finish, this veggie chopper looks great in any kitchen. It's built for daily use and keeps up with all your chopping, slicing, and mixing needs with ease.
description: Product Description EFFICIENT MULTI CHOPPING 200W mini-food chopper lets you mix, blend, mince, chop and purée ingredients at the touch of a button. EASY TO USE AND STORE Assemble the unit and distribute the food evenly around the chopping blades COMPACT & PORTABLE DESIGN The unit is compact with removable components making it easy to store away until next time. SHARP STAINLESS STEEL BLADES 2 sharp blades easily blitz through ingredients and offer long-lasting performance. MULTIUSE FUNCTIONALITY You can chop various ingredients, such as salsa, sauces, onions, small herbs, baby food, meat, ham, vegetables, nuts, seeds and more. EASY TO CLEAN All removable parts can be rinsed with warm soapy water and then dried. VERSATILE USE Allows you chopping, pureeing, mixing and mincing a variety of ingredients quickly. ONE SPEED CONTROL Simply press down button to start the operation
